creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Requested changes:

 * Rename to py-pystun (see PyPI: https://pypi.python.org/pypi/pystun/0.1.0)
 * Prefer CHEESESHOP for MASTER_SITES unless Github has tests/testsuite
 * GH_PROJECT not needed with above change
 * Strip trailing slash from pkg-descr WWW: URL
 * Sort USE_PYTHON values
